name: Placeholder Student A
quote: Baology was the reason I made USABO Finals. The weekly problem sets pushed me harder than anything else I'd done, and the office hours gave me a place to actually understand what I was missing.

name: Placeholder Student B
quote: Before Baology, biology felt like memorization. After a season with Kevin and the team, it started to feel like a puzzle I actually wanted to solve. The lab practical prep alone was worth it.

name: Placeholder Student C
quote: The community is what kept me going. Studying for USABO is lonely on your own — having a group of people who cared as much as I did made the difference.

name: Placeholder Student D
quote: I came in as a beginner and finished the season placing in the top of my school. The curriculum builds on itself in a way that actually works.

name: Placeholder Student E
quote: Vishal and Joseph gave me real, honest feedback on my exam strategy that I couldn't have gotten anywhere else. I'd take the course again in a heartbeat.
